settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Laushe's pure Desi Ghee is a nutrient-dense, traditional superfood made with fresh milk to support overall health and vitality.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Ideal for anyone looking for a wholesome, high-quality cooking fat that promotes better digestion and nutrient absorption.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Rich in healthy fats to fuel natural energy and metabolism
Supports smooth digestion and gut health
Enhances the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E, K)
Promotes glowing skin and supple joints
Sunnah-friendly ingredients for a traditional daily diet
Pure and free from artificial additives or preservatives

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Use for healthy cooking, sautéing, or as a spread on warm rotis
Stir a teaspoon into warm milk or herbal tea for extra nourishment
Drizzle over lentils (daal) or vegetables to enhance flavor and health
Use as a foundation for traditional herbal remedies and recipes

settings.heading: Pure, Wholesome Vitality in Every Spoon.
settings.subheading: Supported by nature, backed by tradition.

settings.title: 100% Pure Milk Fat
settings.desc: Extracted from fresh, high-quality milk for maximum purity

settings.heading: Wholesome Daily Support
settings.step1_text: Use for healthy cooking and sautéing
settings.step2_text: Stir a teaspoon into warm milk
settings.step3_text: Drizzle over rotis or traditional meals
settings.step4_text: Use daily for consistent natural vitality

settings.question: What is Desi Ghee?
settings.answer: Desi Ghee is clarified butter made from cow or buffalo milk, rich in healthy fats and widely used in traditional cooking for its nutritional benefits.

settings.headline: Unlock Traditional Health
settings.subtext: Nourish your body with pure, golden desi ghee for improved digestion and natural energy.
